title: Lophion rydbergii
taxonomy: Lophion rydbergii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It belongs to the genus Lophion, which consists of several species native to North America. Lophion rydbergii is typically found in mountainous regions, where it thrives in moist, shaded environments. The plant's classification is based on its physical characteristics, such as its leaf shape and arrangement. By understanding its classification, botanists can better comprehend the plant's evolution and relationships to other species within the same family.
